costOptimization.description: Additional strategies to maximize savings beyond the base migration.

op1.description: Eliminate idle server costs. Pay only per execution. Ideal for intermittent workloads.
op1.title: Serverless with AWS Lambda

op2.description: Higher workload density per server. Reduces number of instances needed.
op2.title: Containers with ECS/EKS

op3.description: Reduces operational overhead and optimizes database licensing costs.
op3.title: Managed Services (RDS, ElastiCache)

op1.description: 3-year commitment with no upfront payment. Ideal for stable and predictable workloads.
op1.title: 3-Year Reserved Instances (No Upfront)

op2.description: Balance between flexibility and savings. Recommended for workloads with moderate growth.
op2.title: 1-Year Reserved Instances

op3.description: Flexibility to switch between instance families, regions and operating systems.
op3.title: Savings Plans (Compute)

op1.description: Identify oversized instances using CloudWatch metrics and recommend smaller instance types.
op1.title: CPU/RAM Utilization Analysis

op2.description: AWS Graviton3 instances offer up to 40% better price/performance vs equivalent x86 instances.
op2.title: Migration to Graviton (ARM)

op3.description: Implement automatic scaling policies to adjust capacity based on real demand.
op3.title: Dynamic Auto Scaling

op1.description: Automatically moves data between frequent and infrequent access tiers based on usage patterns.
op1.title: S3 Intelligent-Tiering

op2.description: Migrate from gp2 to gp3 for better performance at lower cost. gp3 is 20% cheaper than gp2.
op2.title: EBS Volume Optimization

op3.description: Archive old data to S3 Glacier to reduce long-term storage costs.
op3.title: Lifecycle Policies

costOptimization.title: AWS Cost Optimization

capabilities.description: Access to AI/ML, advanced analytics and next-generation services.
capabilities.title: New Capabilities

innovation.description: Faster development cycles with managed services and modern architectures.
innovation.title: Innovation Speed

performance.description: Native AWS services designed to scale automatically on demand.
performance.title: Optimized Performance

modernization.description: Structured plan to modernize your infrastructure leveraging native AWS services.

init1.description: Migrate to Amazon RDS/Aurora to reduce operational overhead and improve availability.
init1.title: Database Optimization

init2.description: Automate deployment pipelines with AWS CodePipeline, CodeBuild and CodeDeploy.
init2.title: CI/CD Implementation

init3.description: Implement CloudWatch, X-Ray and AWS Config for full system visibility.
init3.title: Monitoring & Observability

init1.description: Migrate monolithic applications to Docker containers for greater portability.
init1.title: Application Containerization

init2.description: Implement container orchestration for scalability and high availability.
init2.title: Orchestration with ECS/EKS

init3.description: Implement secure and observable communication between microservices.
init3.title: Service Mesh & Istio

init1.description: Identify and extract bounded contexts to create independent microservices.
init1.title: Monolith Decomposition

init2.description: Implement asynchronous communication with Amazon SQS, SNS and EventBridge.
init2.title: Event-Driven Architecture

init3.description: Centralize API management with Amazon API Gateway and AWS AppSync.
init3.title: API Gateway & GraphQL

init1.description: Migrate appropriate workloads to serverless architecture for maximum efficiency.
init1.title: Serverless with Lambda

init2.description: Incorporate Amazon SageMaker, Rekognition and Bedrock for AI capabilities.
init2.title: ML/AI Integration

init3.description: Implement modern data architecture with S3, Glue, Athena and QuickSight.
init3.title: Data Lake & Analytics

modernization.title: Modernization Roadmap

mra.description: The MRA evaluates your organization's readiness across infrastructure complexity, team capabilities, and operational requirements to determine the optimal migration approach and timeline.
mra.emptyDescription: Upload your MPA data first to assess migration readiness.
mra.title: Migration Readiness Assessment

mraUploader.dragText: Drag your MRA PDF file here
mraUploader.infoNote: The MRA improves analysis quality by providing context about architecture and risks. For an even more complete analysis, you can also upload the Infrastructure Questionnaire (optional) below.
mraUploader.toastFileTooLarge: The PDF file is too large. Maximum 50MB.

skillsCoE.description: Assess your team's current AWS proficiency and create targeted training plans to build internal expertise. A strong Center of Excellence accelerates migration and reduces reliance on external consultants.

sqlLicensingTable.obs1: • List prices are per 2 cores (Microsoft licensing).
sqlLicensingTable.obs2: • Costs are calculated using: (vCPUs / 2) × List Price.
sqlLicensingTable.obs3: • You can edit list prices to reflect specific negotiations.
sqlLicensingTable.obs4: • Official Microsoft prices for SQL Server 2022: Enterprise $15,123, Standard $3,945 (USD).
sqlLicensingTable.obs5: • Web Edition requires consulting a hosting partner; Developer and Express are free.
sqlLicensingTable.obs6: • Versions marked in RED are out of support and cannot have new licenses purchased.
sqlLicensingTable.obs7: • Purchasing the latest SQL Server version allows downgrading to earlier supported versions.
sqlLicensingTable.obs8: • For out-of-support products, see the official Microsoft list:
sqlLicensingTable.title: SQL Server Licensing Optimization
sqlLicensingTable.warnText: Out-of-support SQL Server versions were detected (shown in red). New licenses CANNOT be purchased for these versions. It is recommended to plan migration to supported versions (SQL Server 2017 or later).

supportRiskAnalysis.legendGreen: Green: Active support — ready to migrate.
supportRiskAnalysis.legendRed: Red: No support — cannot migrate without updating first.
supportRiskAnalysis.legendYellow: Yellow: Support expires in less than 1 year — update before migrating.
